title: Trump's calls, Ukraine's strikes and Russia's barrage on Kyiv put markets on alert
summary_full: Trump reportedly spoke with Putin and Zelenskyy as Ukraine struck Russian targets and Moscow launched another deadly attack on Kyiv.
